channel.title: AI 每日先锋
channel.description: 每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。
channel.itunes:author: AI 先锋

item.title: AI 新闻快报 | 2026-06-02
item.description:
每天 5 分钟，聚合 AI 领域最新发布、技术进展、行业事件与人物采访。

  1. 🔴 Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments (Google AI Blog)
  2. 🔴 100 things we announced at I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  3. 🔴 New ways to create and get things done in Google Workspace (Google AI Blog)
  4. 🔴 I/O 2026: Welcome to the agentic Gemini era (Google AI Blog)
  5. 🔴 Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action (Google AI Blog)
  6. 🔴 A new era for AI Search (Google AI Blog)
  7. 🔴 Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  8. 🟡 德系精工邂逅中国智慧 全新奥迪Q5L现已登陆全国门店 (量子位)
  9. 🟡 材料版AlphaFold来了！40个工业任务全方位SOTA，AI4S迎来行业大突破 (量子位)
  10. 🟡 How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026 (Google AI Blog)
  11. 🟡 Catch up on the Dialogues stage at Google I/O 2026. (Google AI Blog)
  12. 🟡 How AI Mode is changing the way people search in the U.S. (Google AI Blog)
  13. 🟡 5 gardening tips you can try right in Search (Google AI Blog)
  14. 🟡 Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains (HuggingFace Blog)
  15. 🟡 Beyond LLMs: Why Scalable Enterprise AI Adoption Depends on Agent Logic (HuggingFace Blog)
  16. 🟡 Reachy Mini goes fully local (HuggingFace Blog)
  17. 🟡 Introducing the Ettin Reranker Family (HuggingFace Blog)
  18. 🟡 PaddleOCR 3.5: Running OCR and Document Parsing Tasks with a Transformers Backend (HuggingFace Blog)
  19. 🟡 Unlocking asynchronicity in continuous batching (HuggingFace Blog)
  20. 🟡 vLLM V0 to V1: Correctness Before Corrections in RL (HuggingFace Blog)
  21. 🟡 Granite 4.1 LLMs: How They’re Built (HuggingFace Blog)
  22. 🟡 DeepInfra on Hugging Face Inference Providers 🔥 (HuggingFace Blog)
  23. 🟡 QIMMA قِمّة ⛰: A Quality-First Arabic LLM Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  24. 🟡 Inside VAKRA: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Failure Modes of Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  25. 🟡 Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion. (HuggingFace Blog)
  26. 🟡 PhyDrawGen: Physically Grounded Diagram Generation from Natural Language (arXiv cs.AI)
  27. 🟡 Uncertainty-Aware and Temporally Regulated Expert Advice in Reinforcement Learning for Autonomous Driving (arXiv cs.AI)
  28. 🟡 Harness Updating Is Not Harness Benefit: Disentangling Evolution Capabilities in Self-Evolving LLM Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  29. 🟡 Structure-Induced Information for Rerooting Levin Tree Search (arXiv cs.AI)
  30. 🟡 Planner-Centric Reinforcement Learning for Deep Research with Structure-Aware Reward (arXiv cs.AI)
  31. 🟡 HADT: A Heterogeneous Multi-Agent Differential Transformer for Autonomous Earth Observation Satellite Cluster (arXiv cs.AI)
  32. 🟡 Industrializing Prediction-Powered Inference: The GLIDE Library for Reliable GenAI and Agentic Systems Evaluation (arXiv cs.AI)
  33. 🟡 TraceGraph: Shared Decision Landscapes for Diagnosing and Improving Agent Trajectories (arXiv cs.AI)
  34. 🟡 QASM-Eval: A Dataset to Train and Evaluate LLMs on OpenQASM-3 Beyond Quantum Circuits (arXiv cs.LG)
  35. 🟡 NumLeak: Public Numeric Benchmarks as Latent Labels in Foundation Models (arXiv cs.LG)
  36. 🟡 LongDS-Bench: On the Failure of Long-Horizon Agentic Data Analysis (arXiv cs.LG)
  37. 🟡 清智系企业亮相 BEYOND Expo 2026 并斩获多项大奖 (量子位)
  38. 🟡 Token贵只因你喂给模型的垃圾太多了丨@亚马逊王晓野AIGC2026 (量子位)
  39. 🟡 DDIM之父宋佳铭，宣布离职 (量子位)
  40. 🟡 9 demos of Gemini Omni and Gemini 3.5 in action (Google AI Blog)
  41. 🟡 The new AI-powered Google Finance is expanding to Europe. (Google AI Blog)
  42. 🟡 See what happens when creative legends use AI to make ads for small businesses. (Google AI Blog)
  43. 🟡 Welcome NVIDIA Cosmos 3: The First Open Omni-model for Physical AI Reasoning and Action (HuggingFace Blog)
  44. 🟡 Specialization Beats Scale: A Strategic Variable Most AI Procurement Decisions Overlook (HuggingFace Blog)
  45. 🟡 OlmoEarth v1.1: A more efficient family of Earth observation models (HuggingFace Blog)
  46. 🟡 Granite Embedding Multilingual R2: Open Apache 2.0 Multilingual Embeddings with 32K Context — Best Sub-100M Retrieval Quality (HuggingFace Blog)
  47. 🟡 Adding Benchmaxxer Repellant to the Open ASR Leaderboard (HuggingFace Blog)
  48. 🟡 How to build scalable web apps with OpenAI's Privacy Filter (HuggingFace Blog)
  49. 🟡 How to Use Transformers.js in a Chrome Extension (HuggingFace Blog)
  50. 🟡 Ecom-RLVE: Adaptive Verifiable Environments for E-Commerce Conversational Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  51. 🟡 Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers (HuggingFace Blog)
  52. 🟡 Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs (HuggingFace Blog)
  53. 🟡 GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row (GitHub Blog AI)
  54. 🟡 Take your local GitHub sessions anywhere (GitHub Blog AI)
  55. 🟡 Building a general-purpose accessibility agent—and what we learned in the process (GitHub Blog AI)
  56. 🟡 Improving token efficiency in GitHub Agentic Workflows (GitHub Blog AI)
  57. 🟡 Agent pull requests are everywhere. Here’s how to review them. (GitHub Blog AI)
  58. 🟡 Validating agentic behavior when “correct” isn’t deterministic (GitHub Blog AI)
  59. 🟡 Register now for OpenClaw: After Hours @ GitHub (GitHub Blog AI)
  60. 🟡 Building an emoji list generator with the GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  61. 🟡 Google I/O showed how the path for AI-driven science is shifting (MIT Tech Review AI)
  62. 🟡 Roundtables: Can AI Learn to Understand the World? (MIT Tech Review AI)
  63. 🟡 Anthropic’s Code with Claude showed off coding’s future—whether you like it or not (MIT Tech Review AI)
  64. 🟡 Procedural Generation of First Person Shooter Maps using Map-Elites (arXiv cs.AI)
  65. 🟡 Generating Graph-like Rules for Knowledge Graph Reasoning via Diffusion Models (arXiv cs.AI)
  66. 🟡 GraphARC: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Graph-Based Abstract Reasoning (arXiv cs.AI)
  67. 🟡 COLLEAGUE.SKILL: Automated AI Skill Generation via Expert Knowledge Distillation (arXiv cs.AI)
  68. 🟡 Unicorn: Scaling High-Dimensional Time Series Forecasting via Universal Correlation Modeling (arXiv cs.LG)
  69. 🟡 Functional MRI Time Series Generation via Wavelet-Based Image Transform and Spectral Flow Matching for Brain Disorder Identification (arXiv cs.LG)
  70. 🟡 A Novel Evaluation Metric for Unsupervised Learning in AIS-Based Maritime Anomaly Detection: MADQI (arXiv cs.LG)
  71. 🟡 VeriGate: Verifier-Gated Step-Level Supervision for GRPO (arXiv cs.LG)
  72. 🟡 Can Subgraph Explanations Be Weaponized to Steal Graph Neural Networks? (arXiv cs.LG)
  73. 🟡 MAAT: Multi-phase Adapter-Aware Targeted Unlearning (arXiv cs.LG)
  74. 🟡 DisasterLex: An Expert Concept-to-Schema Knowledge Graph for Geospatial Reasoning in Disaster Analytics (arXiv cs.LG)
  75. 🟡 SubsurfaceGen: Procedural Generation of Field-Scale Earth Models and Seismic Data (arXiv cs.LG)
  76. 🟡 Destruction is a General Strategy to Learn Generation; Diffusion's Strength is to Take it Seriously; Exploration is the Future (arXiv cs.LG)
  77. 🟡 云端模型如何落地物理世界？招商局狮子山人工智能实验室用LiOS打通具身智能全链路 (量子位)
  78. 🟡 老黄的Token经济学翻车了！微软亚马逊通通跳车 (量子位)
  79. 🟡 近2亿美元！VAST完成新一轮融资，正式披露世界模型路线 (量子位)
  80. 🟡 今天起，无限期免费！全球首个全模态API开放，Top 10 AI Lab出手 (量子位)
  81. 🟡 OpenAI重返机器人赛道！四大核心岗位开招 (量子位)
  82. 🟡 Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio. (Google AI Blog)
  83. 🟡 Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab. (Google AI Blog)
  84. 🟡 A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam (Google AI Blog)
  85. 🟡 Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler (HuggingFace Blog)
  86. 🟡 Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL (HuggingFace Blog)
  87. 🟡 Harness, Scaffold, and the AI Agent Terms Worth Getting Right (HuggingFace Blog)
  88. 🟡 Introducing NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Long-Context Multimodal Intelligence for Documents, Audio and Video Agents (HuggingFace Blog)
  89. 🟡 DeepSeek-V4: a million-token context that agents can actually use (HuggingFace Blog)
  90. 🟡 AI and the Future of Cybersecurity: Why Openness Matters (HuggingFace Blog)
  91. 🟡 The PR you would have opened yourself (HuggingFace Blog)
  92. 🟡 Dungeons & Desktops: Building a procedurally generated roguelike with GitHub Copilot CLI (GitHub Blog AI)
  93. 🟡 GitHub Copilot CLI for Beginners: Interactive v. non-interactive mode (GitHub Blog AI)
  94. 🟡 The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season (MIT Tech Review AI)
  95. 🟡 It’s time to address the looming crisis in entry-level work (MIT Tech Review AI)
  96. 🟡 Roundtables: Inside the Musk v. Altman Trial (MIT Tech Review AI)
  97. 🟡 EHRBench: An Automated and Reliable EHR-based Benchmark for Clinical Decision Making with LLMs (arXiv cs.AI)
  98. 🟡 Healthcare Mechanisms from Policy-as-Code Search under Strategic Provider Response (arXiv cs.AI)
  99. 🟡 MAVEN: Improving Generalization in Agentic Tool Calling (arXiv cs.AI)
  100. 🟡 Learning Agent-Compatible Context Management for Long-Horizon Tasks (arXiv cs.AI)
  101. 🟡 PReMISE: Policy Rubrics as Measurement Specifications for LLM Judges (arXiv cs.AI)
  102. 🟡 COMPASS: Cognitive MCTS-Guided Process Alignment for Safe Search Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  103. 🟡 Distilling LLM Feedback for Lean Theorem Proving (arXiv cs.AI)
  104. 🟡 UniScale: Adaptive Unified Inference Scaling via Online Joint Optimization of Model Routing and Test-Time Scaling (arXiv cs.AI)
  105. 🟡 BilliardPhys-Bench: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning and Visual Dynamics of Multimodal LLMs (arXiv cs.AI)
  106. 🟡 LLM-FACETS: A Privacy-Preserving Framework for Evaluating LLM Transparency and Accountability (arXiv cs.AI)
  107. 🟡 Diagnosing Failure Modes of Shared-State Collaboration in Resource-Constrained Visual Agents (arXiv cs.AI)
  108. 🟡 Learning to Adapt: Self-Improving Web Agent via Cognitive-Aware Exploration (arXiv cs.AI)
  109. 🟡 When LLMs Learn to Be Consistently Wrong: A Multi-Model Study of Linear Representations of Synthetic Deception (arXiv cs.LG)
  110. 🟡 LLMs Without Deep Neural Networks: New Architecture, Benefits and Case Study (arXiv cs.LG)
  111. 🟡 Bounded Behavioral Indistinguishability for Black-Box LLM Distillation (arXiv cs.LG)
  112. 🟡 Scalable Constrained Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via State Augmentation and Consensus for Separable Dynamics (arXiv cs.LG)
  113. 🟡 Representation Collapse in Sequential Post-Training of Large Language Models (arXiv cs.LG)
  114. 🟡 Measuring, Localizing, and Ablating Alignment Signatures in LLMs (arXiv cs.LG)
  115. 🟡 The Long-Term Effects of Data Selection in LLM Fine-Tuning (arXiv cs.LG)
  116. 🟡 We’re announcing new community investments in Missouri. (Google AI Blog)
  117. 🟡 Google is partnering with XPRIZE and Range Media Partners on the $3.5 million Future Vision film competition. (Google AI Blog)
  118. 🟡 Building Blocks for Foundation Model Training and Inference on AWS (HuggingFace Blog)
  119. 🟡 Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
  120. 🟡 Physically Viable World Models: A Case for Query-Conditioned Embodied AI (arXiv cs.AI)
  121. 🟡 Transforming and Encoding FTS for SAT Solving: What Helps, What Hurts (Extended Version) (arXiv cs.AI)
  122. 🟡 SLAT: Segment-Level Adaptive Trimming for Efficient CoT Reasoning (arXiv cs.AI)
  123. 🟡 A Persona-Based Evaluation Framework for Pluralistic Alignment in Generative AI (arXiv cs.AI)
  124. 🟡 Vector Linking via Cross-Model Local Isometric Consistency (arXiv cs.AI)
  125. 🟡 Formalizing and falsifying causal pathways of rare events (arXiv cs.AI)
  126. 🟡 Gait2Hip-60: A Unified Deep Learning Benchmark for Predicting Hip Muscle Forces and Joint Moments from Multi-Cadence Gait Kinematics (arXiv cs.LG)
  127. 🟡 Calibrated Preference Learning: The Case of Label Ranking (arXiv cs.LG)
  128. 🟡 A Unified Framework for Gradient Aggregation in Multi-Objective Optimization (arXiv cs.LG)
  129. 🟡 DisjunctiveNet: Neural Symbolic Learning via Differentiable Convexified Optimization Layers (arXiv cs.LG)
  130. 🟡 idSCD: Identifying Training Datasets through Semantic Correlation Descriptors (arXiv cs.LG)
  131. 🟡 Universal Multiclass Transductive Online Learning (arXiv cs.LG)
  132. 🟡 Discovering a Zeta Map Algorithm on Dyck Paths via Mechanistic Interpretability (arXiv cs.LG)
  133. 🟡 Graph-Conditioned Mixture of Graph Neural Network Experts for Traffic Forecasting (arXiv cs.LG)
  134. 🟡 Revisiting Padded Transformer Expressivity: Which Architectural Choices Matter and Which Don't (arXiv cs.LG)
  135. 🟡 Early Prediction of Future Behavioral Strategy from Process Traces (arXiv cs.LG)
  136. 🟡 Supervised Training Rapidly Degrades Early Visual Cortex Alignment Across Biologically Plausible Learning Rules (arXiv cs.LG)
  137. 🟢 How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment (MIT Tech Review AI)
  138. 🟢 A reality check on the AI jobs hysteria (MIT Tech Review AI)
  139. 🟢 Scaling creativity in the age of AI (MIT Tech Review AI)
